behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names the embeddings utils module, urllib.request.urlopen, AttributeError, and alphabetical stdlib import ordering — all specifics the tests check.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the symptom and requires a fix, without stating the exact import line to add.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests accept either `import urllib.request` or `from urllib.request import ...`, and only check alphabetical order conditionally when multiple urllib imports exist.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute subprocesses, import modules, call url_retrieve, run ruff check/format, and parse AST.

test_not_tautological.reason: test_url_retrieve_imports_urlopen_directly requires an actual urllib.request import in utils.py via AST inspection, so a stub wouldn't pass.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover urllib.request availability, url_retrieve callability, ruff lint/format, and alphabetical import ordering as described.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are individually named with F2P/P2P docstrings describing purpose.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is a code import fix, not structured data production.

no_typos.reason: Paths and names (lancedb/embeddings/utils.py, url_retrieve, urllib.request) are consistent across files.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction points to the embeddings utils module generally without specifying line numbers; localization remains part of the task.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task, no config edits involved.
